subject.descriptionZh: 序列分析、认知神经、医学信息等交叉方向。

subject.descriptionEn: Sequence analysis, cognitive neuroscience, medical informatics, and related interdisciplinary topics.

Bioinformatics.Bioinformatics.subject: Bioinformatics
